text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
After so much support from everyone and all the
work you put into training me, I really wanted to
live up to your expectations...
choice_data_list:
The important thing is that you keep
challenging yourself.
Then, let's see it in the next race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Even though I'm never able to clinch victory,
everyone still supports me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's why I can't give up! I have to push on and
come in first next time!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! You're already thinking about what comes
next for me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That means I have to keep moving forward! I'll win
next time and meet everyone's expectations!
